metadata.title: macOS Sonoma on Unsupported Mac: OCLP Compatibility Notes
metadata.description: Check model and hardware caveats before planning macOS Sonoma on an unsupported Mac with OpenCore Legacy Patcher.

checker.title: Check a Mac before trying macOS Sonoma with OCLP
checker.description: Use this independent checker as a starting point, then verify official model support and known hardware issues.

workflow.title: Sonoma planning checklist
workflow.description: Confirm whether Sonoma is the right target before touching a production Mac.

items.title: Confirm model identifier
items.description: Marketing names are not enough; use the model identifier from System Information.

items.title: Read wireless caveats
items.description: Wi-Fi and Bluetooth can be a deciding factor on older hardware.

items.title: Review root patches
items.description: Some features depend on post-install root patches and current OCLP support.

items.title: Plan a rollback
items.description: Keep a backup and a recovery path before upgrading.

faq.title: macOS Sonoma OCLP FAQ
faq.description: Short answers for Sonoma compatibility planning.

items.question: Is Sonoma safer than Sequoia on every unsupported Mac?
items.answer: Not necessarily. It depends on the model, GPU, wireless card, and current OCLP support.

items.question: Can this page confirm a successful install?
items.answer: No. It can only help you plan questions to verify in official documentation.
